# DuoLector

> DuoLector is a free web app for long-distance couples. No download required — works on any device in any browser.

## What is DuoLector?

DuoLector is a private digital space built specifically for couples separated by distance. It combines reading, communication, and creativity tools in a single app that works without VPN even in Russia.

## Core Features

- **Synchronized PDF Reader**: Both partners read the same book together in real time. Page changes are synced via Supabase Realtime. A floating bubble shows the partner's current page and reading status.
- **Private Chat**: Real-time messaging with photo sharing, inline translator (MyMemory API), and AI-powered translation assistant.
- **Shared Diary**: Both partners write entries. Long-press to react with emoji. Photos supported.
- **Sealed Letters**: Write letters that only unlock on a specific date, manually when you meet, or with a password. Sender can see when the letter was opened.
- **Collaborative Drawing**: Shared canvas where both partners draw in real time.
- **Music Together**: Shared playlist with synchronized listening.
- **Dual Clocks**: Shows local time and partner's timezone automatically detected.
- **Challenges & Gamification**: Reading challenges, streaks, and km-based XP system.
- **PWA**: Installable as a native app on iOS and Android without any app store.

## Technical Details

- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages (single index.html)
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Realtime + Storage + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Auth**: Email/password and Google OAuth
- **Works in Russia**: Servers in São Paulo, not blocked
- **Languages**: Spanish, English, Russian, Portuguese, French, German

## URLs

- App: https://duolector.com
- Support: matiass161@gmail.com

## Who is it for?

Long-distance couples (LDR) who want a shared private space. Especially useful for couples where one partner is in Russia and the other abroad, since the app works without VPN.

## Privacy

- All data is private to the couple
- No ads
- No data sold to third parties
- Each couple has an isolated data space

## How to get started

1. Go to duolector.com
2. Create an account (email or Google)
3. Copy your invite code from Settings
4. Send it to your partner
5. They join with the code — you're connected

## Pricing

Free. Donations accepted via Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/T6T71WJ3XF
